examples.title: Access Control System
examples.description: A pseudocode example of an access control system that implements the principle of least privilege
examples.code:
IF user.hasPrivilege('read') THEN
  ALLOW access
ELSE
  DENY access
END IF
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example shows how the principle of least privilege can be implemented in an access control system.

examples.title: Secure Password Storage
examples.description: A C code example of secure password storage using the principle of defense in depth
examples.explanation: This C code example shows how the principle of defense in depth can be implemented in secure password storage.

examples.title: Secure Communication
examples.description: A Java code example of secure communication using the principle of complete mediation
examples.explanation: This Java code example shows how the principle of complete mediation can be implemented in secure communication.
